legal_asset_rule: Runtime uses project-local copies with license, provenance, and integrity recorded before import.

visual_targets_needed.description: Beautiful fantasy town gate or square, readable behind UI.
Single fantasy hero portrait or bust for status and battle.
First enemy portrait/sprite for automated battle.
Ornate panels, buttons, quest card, item card, HP/XP bars, map node frames.
Small readable map strip with town, unlocked road, and locked mine.
Dedicated Old Mine route backdrop with cave entrance and mine supports.
XP/gold/item flyouts and battle hit/status feedback.

first_runtime_asset_strategy: The font/text pack is generated by clean native builds. Next visual work must use generated/imported project-local fantasy UI and character/location assets, not procedural placeholders.
